stepBody: The message below was encoded using a Rail Fence Cipher, but the number of rails is not given. Look at how the ciphertext is structured and consider whether a longer zig-zag path might be required to organise the letters. Think about whether arranging the text using only two rows would produce meaningful fragments, or whether a layout involving more than two rows makes more sense.
